title: SessionTriageOutput
description: Output shape for session-triage notifications. The current implementation emits a single human-readable line via session-check.sh; the schema is reserved for the structured JSON variant emitted with --json (planned post-v1.12.0).

fingerprint.description: Stable hash of the drift state used to dedup repeat notifications.

drift_count.description: Total drift items detected (missing + misconfigured + broken_links + CLAUDE.md status).
